KiloCode_Prompt_Framework_2_0_0_Info.annotation: A hierarchical prompt and skill framework for autonomous AI software engineers. Defines roles, interaction protocols, and multi-phase development workflows.

rules_md.annotation: Central rule set defining the interaction protocol and workflow orchestration.

INTERACTION_PROTOCOL_SECTION.NAME: Interaction Protocol
INTERACTION_PROTOCOL_SECTION.annotation: Defines User (Architect) and Agent (Implementer) roles and the Review Policy.

MAIN_SECTION.NAME: Main Principles
MAIN_SECTION.annotation: Key principles: Rule Sovereignty, Generation Completeness, Superposition and Collapse, XML-DOM markup.

WORKFLOW_ORCHESTRATION_SECTION.NAME: Workflow Orchestration
WORKFLOW_ORCHESTRATION_SECTION.annotation: Phase activation protocol: Architect, Code, Debug, QA.

mode_architect_SKILL.annotation: MANDATORY MODE for project design and planning. Focuses on exploration and Development Plan creation.

mode_code_SKILL.annotation: MANDATORY MODE for code implementation and testing. Focuses on SFT-priming and LDD.

mode_debug_SKILL.annotation: MANDATORY MODE for systematic diagnostics and bug fixing. Focuses on LDD trace analysis.

mode_qa_SKILL.annotation: MANDATORY MODE for independent verification. Focuses on impartial judge role and Bug Reports.

graph_protocol_SKILL.annotation: Strict formatting standard for generating XML Knowledge Graphs.

devplan_protocol_SKILL.annotation: Core protocol for development planning, including Draft Code Graph and Data Flow.

document_protocol_SKILL.annotation: Structural protocol for AI-friendly project documentation.

data_transform_SKILL.annotation: Guide for data transformation (ETL, Pandas, SQL) for AI developers.
